question: What is the relationship between the avocado and the nuts in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The avocado and the nuts are inside a bowl.. (B) The avocado and the nuts are on a wooden cutting board.. (C) The avocado is on top of the nuts.. (D) The nuts are on top of the avocado..
gold_answer: The avocado is on top of the nuts
answer_choices: The avocado and the nuts are inside a bowl
The avocado and the nuts are on a wooden cutting board
The avocado is on top of the nuts
The nuts are on top of the avocado
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
